source_name: Prescription of Amount of Indebtedness of Company under paragraph 466(1)(a) (GN No. 21841 of 2020)
section: Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister prescribes the amount of indebtedness of a
section_title: Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister prescribes the amount of indebtedness of a
content:
company for the purposes of that paragraph shall be an amount exceeding
fifty thousand ringgit with effect from 1 January 2021 until 31 March 2021.
